item.title: Drones vs. Farmers on the Farm
item.description: A simple look at drones and farmers in action, showing modern farm life and the work that keeps things moving.

media:content.media:title: Drones vs. Farmers on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A simple look at drones and farmers in action, showing modern farm life and the work that keeps things moving.

item.title: The Real Cost of Farming Right Now
item.description: Laura Farms shares a real look at the cost of farming right now, reflecting the daily realities, hard work, and determination behind life on the farm.

media:content.media:title: The Real Cost of Farming Right Now
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a real look at the cost of farming right now, reflecting the daily realities, hard work, and determination behind life on the farm.

item.title: Taking This Massive Combine for a Spin
item.description: Laura Farms takes a massive combine for a spin, sharing a hands-on look at farm machinery and daily life in the field.

media:content.media:title: Taking This Massive Combine for a Spin
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms takes a massive combine for a spin, sharing a hands-on look at farm machinery and daily life in the field.

item.title: Stop Buying Tools on the Farm
item.description: Laura Farms shares a simple reminder about making do with what you have and keeping farm work practical.

media:content.media:title: Stop Buying Tools on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a simple reminder about making do with what you have and keeping farm work practical.

item.title: Can This Rusty 1968 Ford Start?
item.description: Laura Farms takes on a rusty 1968 Ford and tries to get it running again. A simple farm project with plenty of determination and hands-on work.

media:content.media:title: Can This Rusty 1968 Ford Start?
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms takes on a rusty 1968 Ford and tries to get it running again. A simple farm project with plenty of determination and hands-on work.

item.title: Laura Farms Starts a Children's Book Project
item.description: Laura Farms is teaming up to write a children's book about farming and rural life, with help from FFA and stories from the community.

media:content.media:title: Laura Farms Starts a Children's Book Project
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms is teaming up to write a children's book about farming and rural life, with help from FFA and stories from the community.

item.title: Baling a Neighbor’s Lawn on Laura Farms
item.description: Laura Farms takes on a neighbor’s lawn and turns it into a baling job. A simple farm task with tractors, teamwork, and hands-on learning.

media:content.media:title: Baling a Neighbor’s Lawn on Laura Farms
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms takes on a neighbor’s lawn and turns it into a baling job. A simple farm task with tractors, teamwork, and hands-on learning.

item.title: Starting an Old Tractor for a Free Truck
item.description: Laura Farms shows the process of starting an old tractor in hopes of getting a free truck, capturing a hands-on farm moment with machinery and determination.

media:content.media:title: Starting an Old Tractor for a Free Truck
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shows the process of starting an old tractor in hopes of getting a free truck, capturing a hands-on farm moment with machinery and determination.

item.title: Fleet upgrades on the farm ��
item.description: Laura Farms shares a fleet upgrade moment, keeping the farm moving with fresh machinery and a practical, hands-on approach.

media:content.media:title: Fleet upgrades on the farm ��
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a fleet upgrade moment, keeping the farm moving with fresh machinery and a practical, hands-on approach.

item.title: Can We Dump Corn Before Day’s End?
item.description: Laura Farms works to dump corn before the day is done, keeping the harvest moving with steady teamwork and farm focus.

media:content.media:title: Can We Dump Corn Before Day’s End?
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms works to dump corn before the day is done, keeping the harvest moving with steady teamwork and farm focus.

item.title: Every Farm Needs One of These
item.description: A simple farm essential that keeps daily work moving. Laura Farms shares a practical look at the kind of equipment every farm can use.

media:content.media:title: Every Farm Needs One of These
media:content.media:description: A simple farm essential that keeps daily work moving. Laura Farms shares a practical look at the kind of equipment every farm can use.
